experiment: T3 iter26 — Hssayeni MJFF cross-dataset bridge — DUA probe 2026-05-08
data_table_error: 403 Client Error: There are unmet access requirements that must be met to read content in the requested container.

dummy_sample.name: dummyGeneActiveData_Day1.txt
dummy_sample.schema: tab-separated: timestamp, GENEActiv_X, GENEActiv_Y, GENEActiv_Z, GENEActiv_Magnitude
dummy_sample.interpretation: GeneActive accelerometer (m/s^2 with gravity) at 50 Hz; magnitude is sqrt(x^2+y^2+z^2)

schema_findings.Sensor Data Part I/II: subject_id, device, device_position, participant_day, timestamp_start/end, source_file (FileEntity), data_file_handle_id — IMPORTANT: each row points to a separate FileEntity holding the timeseries.
schema_findings.UPDRS Responses: long-format key-value: subject_id, visit, item_code, item_desc, item_value, is_scored — UPDRS-III items as item_code rows; need pivot to wide.
schema_findings.Patient Onboarding: 45 cols incl. cohort, gender, birth_year, dominant_hand, geneactive_hand, pebble_hand — has updrs_score_p1, updrs_score_p2 (and likely _p3) on disk.
schema_findings.LDOPA_DATA folders: GENEActiv (wrist), Pebble, Phone, Shimmer_{Back, LeftAnkle, LeftWrist, RightAnkle, RightWrist} — each device has its own folder. Hssayeni 2021 paper used GENEActiv at 50Hz.

next_action_required: USER must apply for DUA on ARs 9604905 + 9604906 via the Synapse portal.
dua_application_steps: 2. Click 'Request Access' button — opens the DREAM Challenge AR wizard.
3. Fill IDU (Intended Data Use) statement — required since isIDURequired=true; isIDUPublic=true means it will be shown publicly.
4. Submit. ManagedACTAccessRequirement reviewed by ACT team — typically 1-3 business days.
5. Once approved, the existing token at SYNAPSE_TOKEN already has download permission; no token rotation needed.
6. Re-run probe: ./gpu.sh run_t3_iter26_hssayeni.py --mode probe — should now show isApproved=true.
estimated_dataset_size: Hssayeni 2021 paper reports 13 PD subjects, ~50 Hz GeneActive wrist accelerometer over ~5-7 day home sessions. Total raw size estimated 1-5 GB compressed (per-file FileEntity model — must walk Sensor Data Part I/II tables to enumerate file_handle_ids).
iter26_pipeline_status: BLOCKED at DUA gate. Architecture frozen per pre-reg scaffolding. Awaiting user DUA approval on ARs 9604905 + 9604906.
